2604.25849.title: ADEMA: A Knowledge-State Orchestration Architecture for Long-Horizon Knowledge Synthesis with LLMAgents
2604.25849.paper_summary: Long-horizon LLM tasks often fail not because a single answer is unattainable, but because knowledge states drift across rounds, intermediate commitments remain implicit, and interruption fractures the evolving evidence chain. This paper presents ADEMA as a knowledge-state orchestration architecture for long-horizon knowledge synthesis rather than as a generic multi-agent runtime. The architecture combines explicit epistemic bookkeeping, heterogeneous dual-evaluator governance, adaptive task-mode switching, reputation-shaped resource allocation, checkpoint-resumable persistence, segment-level memory condensation, artifact-first assembly, and final-validity checking with safe fallback. Evidence is drawn entirely from existing materials: a four-scenario showcase package, a fixed 60-run mechanism matrix, targeted micro-ablation and artifact-chain supplements, and a repaired protocol-level benchmark in which code-oriented evaluation is the clearest quality-sensitive mechanism block. Across the fixed matrix, removing checkpoint/resume produced the only invalid run, and it did so in the interruption-sensitive resume condition. By contrast, dual evaluation, segment synthesis, and dynamic governance are best interpreted as supporting control mechanisms that shape trajectory discipline, explicit artifact progression, and cost-quality behavior rather than as universal binary prerequisites for completion. The contribution is therefore a knowledge-state orchestration architecture in which explicit epistemic state transition, evidence-bearing artifact progression, and recoverable continuity are the primary design commitments.
2604.25849.paper_summary_zh: 長期的 LLM 任務經常失敗，並非因為單一答案無法獲得，而是因為知識狀態在回合之間漂移、中間承諾保持隱含，且中斷破壞了不斷演變的證據鏈。本文提出 ADEMA 作為長期知識綜合的知識狀態協調架構，而非通用的多代理運行時。該架構結合了明確的認識記錄、異質的雙評估治理、自適應任務模式切換、基於聲譽的資源分配、可檢查恢復的持久性、段級記憶凝聚、以工件為先的組裝，以及最終有效性檢查和安全回退。證據完全來自現有材料：一個四場景展示包、一個固定的 60 次運行機制矩陣、針對性的微剝除和工件鏈補充，以及一個修復的協議級基準，其中以代碼為導向的評估是最明確的質量敏感機制區塊。在固定矩陣中，移除檢查點/恢復產生了唯一的無效運行，並且是在對中斷敏感的恢復條件下發生的。相比之下，雙重評估、段合成和動態治理最好被解釋為支持控制機制，這些機制塑造了軌跡紀律、明確的工件進展和成本-質量行為，而不是作為完成的普遍二元前提。因此，貢獻是一個知識狀態協調架構，其中明確的認識狀態轉變、承載證據的工件進展和可恢復的連續性是主要的設計承諾。
2604.25849.author: Zhou Hanlin et.al.
